message:
Fix Console unit test assertions

- test_console_options_update_width: update_width clamps to min of
  current and new width, so test with larger initial (100) and smaller
  update (80)
- test_console_options_update_height: assert on updated.height (Some(50))
  not updated.size.height which doesn't change
- test_print_options_implements_default: Default::default() yields empty
  strings, PrintOptions::new() sets " " and "\n" - test both behaviors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
